column1: 0%Living Room%John is watching the telly. He is watching reruns of The Chase.
1%Hallway%There is a stack of misdelivered letters and local takeaway leaflets on the side table.
2%Kitchen%John is waiting on a plumber to fix the sink. He has to get water from the bathroom tap for now...
3%Bedroom%The bed is freshly made. A thin layer of dust covers John's trinkets
column2: which all seem very thoughtfully placed.

column1: 4%Bathroom%A very small and wet sink sits in the corner of the bathroom. The wall is speckled with plastic tropical fish.
5%Back Garden%The modest garden is fenced by large hedges. A shed sits at the end.
6%Front Garden%A single garden gnome lies face first in the grass next to an empty birdbath.
7%Garage%The garage is filled with loaded cardboard boxes - most of which used to house crisps or frozen chips.
8%Shed%John's shed is mostly bare other than a few books and a deck chair. Perhaps this is his home away from home.
